title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a prompt threat model and red-team suite after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted instructions from untrusted data and label authority boundaries.
Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.
Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Instruction Data Separation · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for prompt security injection that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
